title: NOBEL Stainless Steel Deep Two Tone Saucepan with Glass Vented Lid Heat Resistant Handles, Ideal for All hobs (Set of 3 16,18 & 20 cm)
features: Made from high quality stainless steel which is hygienic and easy to clean.Extra thick stainless steel body for better durability

VERSATILE DESIGN: Stainless steel saucepan with glass vented lid, perfect for all hob types including induction, gas, and electric cooktops.Stainless Steel, Alumium Stainless Steel Bottom : The bottom of the saucepot is made from thick aluminium to ensure even heat distribution so that the food does not burn

PREMIUM CONSTRUCTION: Two-tone stainless steel body with heat-resistant handles for safe and comfortable handling during cooking,Riveted sturdy handle which does not loosen up thus ensuring maximum durability
THOUGHTFUL FEATURES: Vented glass lid allows steam release while monitoring cooking progress, preventing boil-overs
MAINTENANCE: Easy-to-clean stainless steel surface that maintains its lustre with proper care and regular cleaning
This Saucepot provides the multipurpose Cooking like Deep Frying, Sautéing, Stewing, Boiling. Multi-purpose as you can use the pot for cooking and serving.
